subject: LV-RUN-3 — Archive 2 stale handoff messages from handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/
body:
Per parent task LANE01-W1-LOOP-VALIDATION-V1 (V1.1 W1.6) Run 3: archive 2 stale handoff messages from `handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/` to `handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/_archive/`. This run is the **handoff-route intensive** test — verify aier-handoff-route's pull/push behavior + ACK protocol in real workflow.

Stale messages identified:
- `MSG-L03-L01-REVIEW-20260426-002.json` — review request for LAW_N7-N11 v0.4 packet (now ACTIVE since 2026-04-27 — review request superseded by activation; processed via `LANE01-LAWS-N7-N11-APPROVAL-APPLY-V1` commit `f10c885`).
- `MSG-L03-L01-REVIEW-20260426-003.json` — review request likely related to same era, also superseded by canon activation.

Deliverables:
1. `git mv` 2 stale messages to `handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/_archive/` (preserve git history per R-CANON-02 — content NOT deleted).
2. Single commit + push.

Rollback: `git mv` from _archive/ back to inbox parent.
requested_action: Lane_01 (CLAC-1) executor identifies 2 stale messages, git mv to _archive subfolder, commits with [vercel skip], pushes. aier-handoff-route invoked again post-archive to confirm cleaned inbox listing.
acceptance_criteria: 2 stale messages archived to handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/_archive/ (git mv preserves history)
HEAD matches origin/main; worktree clean post-push
ACK protocol exercised in handoff-route invocations
No SKILL.md or METADATA.yaml of any skill modified (boundary: invoke only)
